name: Analytical Kinematics Planner
description: Create an AnalyticalKinematicsPlanner for closed-form FK/IK. Runs in-process; no ROS or PyBullet required.

inputParameters.name: solver
inputParameters.description: Name of the analytical solver: 'ur3', 'ur3e', 'ur5', 'ur5e', 'ur10', 'ur10e', 'staubli_tx260l', or 'abb_irb4600_40_255'.

inputParameters.name: robot_cell
inputParameters.description: Optional RobotCell to assign to the planner (planner.set_robot_cell). Recommended so FK/IK/Cartesian-motion components can resolve TargetMode.TOOL / TargetMode.WORKPIECE.

inputParameters.name: verbose
inputParameters.description: Print solver diagnostics. Defaults to False.
